metadata.description: The friendly name for the workbook that is used in the Gallery or Saved List.  This name must be unique within a resource group.
The gallery that the workbook will been shown under. Supported values include workbook, tsg, etc. Usually, this is 'workbook'
The id of resource instance to which the workbook will be associated
The unique guid for this workbook instance

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## kg-conformance, live metrics"},"name":"text - 2"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"customMetrics
| where name in ("kgc.validate.requests", "kgc.validate.violations", "kgc.ground.verdicts")
| summarize Total = sum(value) by name","size":0,"timeContext":{"durationMs":3600000},"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"query - 2"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"customMetrics
| where name == "kgc.ground.tokens"
| summarize Tokens = sum(value) by name","size":4,"timeContext":{"durationMs":3600000},"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"name"},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"Tokens"},"showBorder":true,"styleSettings":{"backgroundColor":"colorGray300"}}},"name":"query - 2"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"requests
| summarize Requests = count(), AvgMs = round(avg(duration), 1), p95Ms = round(percentile(duration, 95), 1) by name
| order by Requests desc","size":0,"timeContext":{"durationMs":3600000},"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"table"},"name":"query - 3"}],"isLocked":false,"fallbackResourceIds":["/subscriptions/c41f6082-5995-4314-8d7d-73547b71e197/resourceGroups/rg-kg-conformance/providers/Microsoft.Insights/components/appi-kg-conformance"]}
